subject: fix(home): replace over-engineered BottomSheet layout with simple flex column
body:
Map was not rendering on mobile web due to complex platform-split layout
with PanResponder, snap points, animated collapsible filters, and
absolute positioning. Replaced with dead-simple vertical flex:
- Map: fixed 250px height
- Filters: inline, no animation
- Station list: fills remaining space, scrolls naturally

No platform splits. No BottomSheet. No PanResponder. One code path.

Tags: ui, fix, simplification
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: home-screen
Semver: patch
